name: cross-enterprise
title: Cross-Enterprise Verification: Hub-and-Spoke Proof Aggregation for Multi-Enterprise Validium
hypothesis: A hub-and-spoke model where the L1 aggregates proofs from multiple enterprises can verify cross-enterprise interactions (e.g., enterprise A sells to enterprise B) without revealing data from either, using proof aggregation with < 2x overhead over individual verification.
null_hypothesis: Cross-enterprise verification requires >= 2x gas overhead compared to individual enterprise verification, OR the privacy guarantee breaks down (data from enterprise A is leaked to enterprise B during cross-reference), OR proof generation time for cross-reference exceeds 120 seconds making the system impractical.
